text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Damn it, I lost! Everyone's going to<n>start
smack-talking me again!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They're always like, "You're too<n>short to do well
in races"... "You're<n>not suited for the turf"... Pisses
me<n>off!
choice_data_list: Channel that frustration into fuel for your training!
Channel that frustration into fuel for your training!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They're always like, "You're too<n>short to do well
in races"... "You're<n>not suited for the turf"... Pisses
me<n>off!
choice_data_list: Channel that frustration into fuel for your training!
Channel that frustration into fuel for your training!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, whatever! I don't need your pity!
choice_data_list: It's not pity! I really do believe in you!
It's not pity! I really do believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
How can you be so sure of me when<n>I have
nothing to show for it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
All you say is that you believe in me<n>whenever I
lose.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Honestly, I don't believe you when<n>you say that!
choice_data_list: Then let me tell you why I'm so confident in you!

text_block_list.text:
If she doesn't trust me, then I'll just<n>have to
explain everything until she<n>does.

Her competitive spirit and relentless<n>determination,
not to mention her final<n>sprint, are her strengths.
I'm<n>expounding on her acceptance of and
devotion to overcoming her<n>weaknesses, when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Stop! Geez, okay! I get it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win next time just so I<n>don't have to
go through this again!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm sick and tired of being looked<n>down on all the
time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll blow past everyone and<n>take first
place!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm just annoyed that I got caught up<n>in your
dumb energy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But, ugh... I guess I need you if I want<n>to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Beef up my training regimen—make it<n>tougher. If
you go easy on me, I'll<n>end you.

Although slightly displeased, Narita<n>Taishin feels
more determined than<n>ever to win her upcoming
race.
